title: Transparency Obligations for Providers and Deployers of Certain AI Systems

articles.title: Transparency Obligations
articles.summary: AI interacting with persons must disclose AI nature. Deepfakes must be labelled. Emotion recognition/biometric categorisation must inform exposed persons. AI-generated text on public interest must be machine-readable labelled.
obligations: AI systems interacting with natural persons must disclose they are AI (unless obvious from context)
Providers of AI generating synthetic audio, image, video, or text must ensure outputs are marked in machine-readable format as artificially generated or manipulated
Deployers using AI for emotion recognition or biometric categorisation must inform exposed natural persons
Deployers using AI to generate or manipulate content constituting a deep fake must disclose it is artificially generated or manipulated
Deployers using AI to generate or manipulate text published for informing the public on matters of public interest must disclose AI generation
